title: Intravenous immunoglobulin for the treatment of  invasive PVL-SA
body: "This rapid systematic review identified and summarised evidence on the use of intravenous immunoglobulin as treatment for invasive Panton-Valentine Leukocidin Staphylococcus aureus infections in hospital inpatients.  This rapid systematic review searched for research published up to 18 December 2024. Seven case reports were included. "
